tarot.name: The World
tarot.description: Convert up to 3 cards in hand to ♠ Spades

tarot.name: The Hierophant
tarot.description: Apply bonus enhancement to up to 2 cards in hand

tarot.name: Death
tarot.description: Select 2 cards in hand: left card becomes a copy of the right

tarot.name: The Moon
tarot.description: Convert up to 3 cards in hand to ♣ Clubs

tarot.name: Death
tarot.description: Select 2 cards in hand: left card becomes a copy of the right

tarot.name: The Tower
tarot.description: Apply stone enhancement to 1 card in hand

tarot.name: The Devil
tarot.description: Apply gold enhancement to 1 card in hand

jokers.name: To Do List
jokers.description: Earn $4 if poker hand is the listed hand; hand changes every round

jokers.name: Baron
jokers.description: Each King held in hand gives X1.5 Mult

jokers.name: Yorick
jokers.description: +30 Mult on every played hand

jokers.name: Brainstorm
jokers.description: Copies the ability of the leftmost Joker

jokers.name: Arrowhead
jokers.description: +50 Chips per scored Spade
